name: billbee
description: Access Billbee multichannel orders, products, and customers, and update order states for e-commerce order management

envVars.name: BILLBEE_USERNAME
envVars.description: Billbee account username (email), used as the HTTP Basic username

envVars.name: BILLBEE_API_PASSWORD
envVars.description: Billbee API password set under Settings → API (not the account login password), used as the HTTP Basic password

envVars.name: BILLBEE_API_KEY
envVars.description: Billbee developer API key identifying your application, sent in the X-Billbee-Api-Key header (request via support@billbee.io)

tools.name: List Orders
tools.description: List orders across all connected shops, optionally filtered by date range, modification time, or order state

minOrderDate.description: Oldest order date to include, ISO 8601, e.g. 2026-06-01T00:00:00Z

maxOrderDate.description: Newest order date to include, ISO 8601

modifiedAtMin.description: Only orders modified after this date, ISO 8601

orderStateId.description: Only orders in these states (one or more state IDs), e.g. 1=ordered, 2=confirmed, 3=paid, 4=shipped (full list via the order states enum endpoint)

tag.description: Only orders with one of these tags attached

tools.name: Get Order
tools.description: Get a single order with positions, addresses, and payment details by its internal Billbee ID

orderId.description: Internal Billbee ID of the order

tools.name: Update Order State
tools.description: Change the main state of an order, e.g. mark it as confirmed, paid, or shipped

orderId.description: Internal Billbee ID of the order

NewStateId.description: New order state ID, e.g. 1=ordered, 2=confirmed, 3=paid, 4=shipped (full list via the order states enum endpoint)

tools.name: List Products
tools.description: List products (articles) in the Billbee account

minCreatedAt.description: Only products created after this date, ISO 8601

tools.name: List Customers
tools.description: List customers in the Billbee account

tools.name: List Invoices
tools.description: List invoices with positions and amounts over a date range — the export feed into accounting tools. Throttled to 1 request per minute for the same page and minInvoiceDate.

minInvoiceDate.description: Oldest invoice date to include, ISO 8601

maxInvoiceDate.description: Newest invoice date to include, ISO 8601

includePositions.description: Include invoice line items in the response

tools.name: Get Order States
tools.description: List all defined order state IDs and names — resolves the NewStateId values used by Update Order State

tools.name: Update Stock
tools.description: Set the absolute stock quantity of a product by SKU or Billbee product ID — the most common multichannel write; the change is pushed to connected shops

Sku.description: SKU of the product to update (alternative to BillbeeId)

BillbeeId.description: Billbee product ID to update (alternative to Sku)

NewQuantity.description: New absolute stock quantity to set

StockId.description: Stock ID if the multi-stock feature is activated

Reason.description: Optional reason text for the stock update

AutosubtractReservedAmount.description: Automatically reduce NewQuantity by the currently unfulfilled (reserved) amount

prompts.title: Review open orders
prompts.prompt: List my recent Billbee orders that are not yet shipped and summarize them by state and shop.

prompts.title: Mark order as paid
prompts.prompt: Look up a Billbee order I specify and update its state to paid.

prompts.title: Customer lookup
prompts.prompt: Find a Billbee customer and summarize their recent orders.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Billbee API setup

steps.title: Create a Billbee account
steps.description: Sign up at https://app.billbee.io — a free trial is available for testing.

steps.title: Activate the API and set an API password
steps.description: In Billbee open Settings → API (https://app.billbee.io/app_v2/settings/api/general), activate the API module, and set a dedicated API password. This is separate from your account login password.

steps.title: Request an API key
steps.description: Email support@billbee.io with a short note about what you are building to receive a developer API key. This key identifies your application and is sent as the X-Billbee-Api-Key header.

steps.title: Store the credentials
steps.description: Add BILLBEE_USERNAME (your Billbee login email), BILLBEE_API_PASSWORD, and BILLBEE_API_KEY to your .env file, then run the List Orders tool to verify access.

notes: Every request needs BOTH HTTP Basic auth (username + API password) AND the X-Billbee-Api-Key header
Rate limit: max 2 requests per second per API key + user combination; some endpoints have stricter per-call throttles
Responses wrap payloads in a Data field alongside Paging and ErrorMessage fields
